items.name: J. Tan
items.quote: Xiu took the time to understand not just my portfolio, but my family's goals. I finally feel like I have a plan instead of a guess.

items.name: M. Lim
items.quote: What stood out was the honesty. Xiu was upfront about trade-offs instead of just selling me the first product that came up.

items.name: S. Koh
items.quote: Retirement planning felt overwhelming until we sat down together. Everything was explained clearly, with no pressure.
